references.passiveText: I still owe a favor to someone in {location}. They helped us once, back when things were better.
references.triggerDialogue: Years ago, {target_npc} lent us seed grain when our harvest failed. We never repaid it. If you find yourself near {location}, maybe you could check in on them. I worry they might need help now too.

references.passiveText: There's talk of a skilled alchemist who might know a permanent cure for what ails us.
references.triggerDialogue: I've only heard whispers: an alchemist somewhere {location_hint} who brews remedies from things most people wouldn't dare touch. {target_npc} met them once and said they were... eccentric, but brilliant. Could be worth seeking out if you have the stomach for it.
